recent_calls.summary: The user, Rodrigo Black, reported a plumbing emergency with sewage backing up into his basement. The agent documented and escalated the emergency but could not dispatch a technician immediately due to after-hours. The user was informed that the team will contact him on the next business day.

The user, Laureiona, called to report an emergency cooling issue with their air conditioning. The agent documented the issue and informed the user that a representative will call back on the next business day since it was after-hours. The user declined any further assistance and ended the call.

The user called to inquire about the type of refrigerant needed for their unit. The agent informed the user that specific technical details cannot be provided after-hours and assured that a licensed technician will follow up on the next business day. The user did not request any additional services.

The call was an inbound call where the agent repeatedly asked the user for their ZIP code to start the service process, but the user responded with a survey prompt and then ended the call abruptly. No service or information exchange was completed.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live representative, but the agent informed them that it was not possible to connect to a live representative at that time. The call ended shortly after without further action.

Laureiona called to report that her system is not working and requested service. The agent documented the issue and informed her that a representative will call back on the next business day since it was after hours. The call ended with no further requests from the user.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and the user hanging up immediately without any interaction.

The user, Natasha, called requesting emergency plumbing service for a mainline clog. The agent explained that Budget does not provide emergency plumbing services in Fairview Heights, Illinois, and the user declined any follow-up or alternative services. The call ended with no service arranged or follow-up requested.

Laureiona called to report that her air conditioning stopped working again after a recent service, causing the temperature in her home to become dangerously high. The agent documented the urgent request and scheduled a morning visit for the next business day, Monday. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to Nicole. The agent informed the user that transfers are not possible after hours but offered to take a message for Nicole. The call ended shortly after without further interaction.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live representative. The agent informed the user that live representatives were unavailable and offered to take their information for a follow-up on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without further interaction.

The user called Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing's after-hours line mistakenly thinking it was Kohl's. The agent clarified the service and the user indicated they did not need any assistance. The call ended without any service request.
The user called after hours requesting a live representative, but the agent informed them that live representatives were unavailable and began to take down information before the call ended abruptly.

Cassandra called to reschedule a follow-up HVAC service appointment because her system needed to thaw before servicing and is not cooling effectively. The agent confirmed her details and scheduled the appointment for Monday or Tuesday as a regular service. Cassandra declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to reschedule a cooling service appointment with American Home Shield. The agent confirmed details, noted the user is the homeowner, and arranged for Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing to contact the user for rescheduling. The user also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

Raphael called to schedule a heating recall appointment due to water running on the floor around the furnace. The agent confirmed details and offered available time slots, but the booking attempt failed due to a scheduling conflict or unavailability. The call ended without successfully booking the appointment.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer.

Annie called to request an earlier air conditioner service due to high temperatures and an elderly person in the home. The agent collected all necessary information, confirmed the service details, and informed Annie that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Annie declined information about maintenance programs and expressed some frustration with the AI assistant, leading to a transfer to a live agent.
Caroline called Budget and requested to be connected with a representative. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.
The user called to return a missed call and requested to be connected with a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any interaction or request for services. The agent attempted to engage the user but received no response before the user hung up.

Steven called to schedule a plumbing service for his hot water tank that isn't lighting. The agent confirmed the service details and preferred time slot, but the booking attempt failed due to a scheduling conflict. The agent assured Steven that a human agent would follow up to confirm availability.
The call was very brief, with the user asking if they were speaking with the owner and the agent introducing herself as Budget's assistant before the call ended abruptly.
The user called to speak with a person about scheduling and was promptly transferred to a live agent who could assist with their request. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user, Caroline, called to return a missed call and requested to speak with a representative. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user attempted to speak with someone and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted briefly before the transfer was completed successfully.
The user requested to speak with a human agent, and the AI agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.

Kyle called to report that his AC is running but not blowing cold air and requested the first available service appointment this week. The agent scheduled a provisional appointment for Sunday, June 22nd at 2 PM and confirmed the details with Kyle. Kyle provided positive feedback about the ease of the transaction before ending the call.

Caroline scheduled a follow-up appointment for air conditioning repair at her address, specifying that the line set costing $225 is not covered by insurance and will be paid directly to the technician. She provided her preferred days for service and confirmed her contact details. The agent offered information about maintenance programs, which Caroline declined, and she gave positive feedback about the AI assistant's understanding.
The user initiated the call but decided not to proceed with the conversation and ended the call shortly after it started.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond the initial greeting from the agent. The user hung up shortly after the agent introduced herself.

The user called after hours requesting assistance and a callback from a live agent during business hours. The agent informed the user of the office hours and confirmed the callback request for after-hours assistance. The call ended with the user declining further help.

The user, Sylvester, called after hours wanting to schedule a meeting with Daniel for any day next week, preferably Monday or Tuesday. The agent, Evie, was unable to connect him directly but documented the request to pass along to Daniel. The call ended with the user expressing thanks.

The user reported water coming up from PVC pipes near their air conditioning system in the basement and described it as an urgent issue. The agent documented the problem, flagged it as urgent, and informed the user that a team member would contact them on the next business day since it was after hours. The user did not request any further assistance during the call.

The user called after hours requesting to speak with a live representative. The agent explained that live representatives are unavailable after 4 PM but on-call technicians are available for emergencies until 8 PM. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.
The call was very brief with the user unable to communicate clearly, and the agent introduced themselves but did not complete any service or information exchange.
The call was very brief, with the user identifying themselves as a patient but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.

The user called to reschedule an appointment to Thursday, June 25th, between 12 and 2 PM. The agent confirmed the request and informed the user that the team will follow up next business day to confirm the new appointment time. The call ended after the user declined to provide any additional updates or instructions.

Daryl called to schedule a routine seasonal air conditioner checkup for the summer as part of his regular maintenance. The agent confirmed the appointment details and offered information about home maintenance programs, which Daryl declined. The call ended positively with Daryl providing excellent feedback on the service.
The agent initiated the call by asking the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.
The user requested to speak with Daniel, and the agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent named Daniel. The call was successfully transferred without further conversation.

The user, Andrea, called back in response to a message about a service appointment and confirmed the scheduled day was acceptable. The agent attempted to connect her with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.

The user called back after a missed call and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent collected minimal information before initiating the transfer. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user called to check the technician's arrival time. The agent could not find the appointment in the system and offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative. The user requested a transfer, and the call was successfully transferred to a live agent.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation before the transfer.

The user called to request routine furnace service in Illinois and provided their contact details. The agent collected the necessary information and then transferred the call to a live representative as requested by the user.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another representative successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.
